attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.ecosystimephasedbudgetid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectnumber,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectperiod,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.workflowinstanceid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.budgetheaderid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.changeheaderid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.costaccountfield,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.pathid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.minorperiod,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.jacobscost,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.clientcost,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.jacobshours,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.clienthours,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.currency,
	concat(projectnumber,'~', projectperiod, '~',minorPeriod , '~',EcoSysTimephasedBudgetId ),
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.gidquantity,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget..GDCName
FROM
    bi_timephaseddata_budget
where  workflowinstanceid in (
select distinct workflowinstanceid
from BI_TimephasedData_Queue)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.ecosystimephasedbudgetid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectnumber,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectperiod,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.workflowinstanceid+1000000 as workflowinstanceid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.budgetheaderid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.changeheaderid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.costaccountfield,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.pathid,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.minorperiod,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.jacobscost,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.clientcost,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.jacobshours,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.clienthours,
    bi_timephaseddata_budget.currency,
	concat(bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectnumber,'~', bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectperiod, '~',bi_timephaseddata_budget.minorPeriod , '~',bi_timephaseddata_budget.EcoSysTimephasedBudgetId ),
	bi_timephaseddata_budget.gidquantity,
	bi_timephaseddata_budget.GDCName,
	bi_timephaseddata_budget.GIDCBDirectCost,
	bi_timephaseddata_budget.GIDCBAtBillRevenue,
	bi_timephaseddata_budget.GIDBillableHours
FROM
    bi_timephaseddata_budget
--where  workflowinstanceid in ( 695,702)
--select workflowinstanceid
--from BI_TimephasedData_Queue where enddate>=convert(datetime,'$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE',121))
inner join
	(select distinct projectnumber, workflowinstanceid
from BI_TimephasedData_Queue
where  editeddate > convert(datetime,'$$LAST_EXTRACT_DATE',121) --'10/13/2020'
and workflowinstanceid is not null) new_data
on bi_timephaseddata_budget.projectnumber = new_data.projectnumber
and bi_timephaseddata_budget.workflowinstanceid = new_data.workflowinstanceid
and bi_timephaseddata_budget.workflowinstanceid is not null and bi_timephaseddata_budget.workflowinstanceid > 0
